conversations.content: What's a good summary of my 100 most recent transactions this year in terms of categories and amounts?

This will help in categorizing and summarizing the transaction amounts appropriately. I will execute the `get_most_recent_transactions` function to retrieve the necessary transaction data.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_most_recent_transactions(n=100)]</function_call>
